heroInsight: Carousel posts are dominating engagement in 2026 with a staggering 61% share of content and an average of 185 likes per post — swipe-through content is outperforming single posts significantly.

formatPerformance.summary: Carousels are the clear winners, capturing high engagement with their interactive swipe-through format. Reels remain relevant for their dynamic and engaging nature, while static posts lag behind.

data.name: Reel
data.note: Reels continue to thrive due to their immersive format and high retention rates — a must-use for capturing attention quickly.

data.name: Carousel
data.note: Carousels are seeing massive save rates and interaction, evidenced by top posts from @dumbbellslicey and @onepunchnaz with over 11k likes.

data.name: Story
data.note: Stories remain a critical engagement tool for gymfluencers, offering real-time content and direct interaction with followers.

data.name: Static
data.note: Static posts are underperforming with average likes of 26, highlighting a shift towards more interactive content formats.

trendingHooks.template: I stopped [X] and here's what happened
trendingHooks.example: I stopped drinking protein shakes and here's what happened
trendingHooks.whyItWorks: Creates a curiosity gap that drives engagement and comments.

trendingHooks.example: I tried intermittent fasting for 30 days
trendingHooks.whyItWorks: Encourages viewers to witness the transformation or results, fostering shares and saves.

trendingHooks.example: POV: You're hitting a new bench PR and your spotter is on their phone
trendingHooks.whyItWorks: Highly relatable, sparking comments and shares among gym-goers.

trendingHooks.example: Why I stopped using lifting straps
trendingHooks.whyItWorks: Creates intrigue and invites opinions, leading to high comment rates.

trendingHooks.example: Switching to full-body workouts changed my gains forever
trendingHooks.whyItWorks: Promises transformative results, compelling viewers to engage and inquire.

postingTimes.summary: Optimal posting times align with early morning and early evening hours to capture peak engagement.

trendingAudio.name: Monkeys Spinning Monkeys — Kevin MacLeod & Kevin The Monkey
trendingAudio.recommendation: Perfect for gym humor and light-hearted workout fails
trendingAudio.howToFind: Search 'Monkeys Spinning Monkeys' in TikTok audio library

trendingAudio.name: Debussy "Clair de Lune" Piano Solo(1428687) — harryfaoki
trendingAudio.recommendation: Pairs well with transformation and aesthetic content for a dramatic effect
trendingAudio.howToFind: Search 'Clair de Lune' in TikTok audio library

trendingAudio.name: blow hoodtrap remix itsdryko — DRYKO
trendingAudio.recommendation: Ideal for intense workout clips and PR attempts
trendingAudio.howToFind: Search 'blow hoodtrap' in TikTok audio library

trendingAudio.name: Blade Runner 2049 — Synthwave Goose
trendingAudio.recommendation: Great for futuristic and tech-inspired gym content
trendingAudio.howToFind: Search 'Blade Runner 2049' in TikTok audio library

hotTopics.detail: As spring approaches, more creators are documenting their cut phases to showcase transformations.
hotTopics.angle: Focus on the mental aspect of cutting and the discipline involved — less explored than physical results.
hotTopics.exampleCaption: Cutting isn't just about losing weight, it's about mental toughness 💪 #CuttingSeason

hotTopics.detail: New drops from YoungLA are creating buzz across gymfluencer communities.
hotTopics.angle: Unboxing and first impressions of new collections — less saturated than styling posts.
hotTopics.exampleCaption: First look at the latest YoungLA drop! Unboxing my new gym fits 🚀

hotTopics.detail: Collaborations with top athletes are bringing fresh attention to the brand.
hotTopics.angle: Behind-the-scenes of collaboration shoots and athlete interviews — unique insights not widely covered.
hotTopics.exampleCaption: Behind the scenes with [Athlete] for the new Gymshark collab! 🎥 #BTS

hotTopics.detail: The collaboration is creating a wave with unique Y2K-inspired gymwear.
hotTopics.angle: Highlighting the nostalgic Y2K aesthetics in everyday gym routines — not just fashion shows.
hotTopics.exampleCaption: Bringing Y2K vibes to the squat rack with Darcsport x Von Dutch 🔥 #Y2KFit

hotTopics.detail: With cutting season here, high-protein diets are under the spotlight for muscle preservation.
hotTopics.angle: Creative high-protein meals and snacks — beyond the typical chicken and rice.
hotTopics.exampleCaption: Tired of the same old chicken? Try my high-protein pancake recipe! 🥞 #ProteinPower

hotTopics.detail: More influencers are becoming DFYNE athletes, sparking conversation around the brand.
hotTopics.angle: Personal stories and journeys to becoming a DFYNE athlete — adds a personal touch.
hotTopics.exampleCaption: From gym-goer to DFYNE athlete — here's my journey 🙌 #DFYNEFam

brandSignals.evidence: 50 posts mentioning DFYNE, avg 80 likes, top post by @emilyascari_
brandSignals.actionable: Share your journey to becoming a DFYNE athlete to connect with your audience.

brandSignals.actionable: Create content around your supplement stack and include Ghost to leverage rising interest.

brandSignals.detail: Partnerships with fitness influencers are boosting brand visibility.

brandSignals.actionable: Highlight how Prime supplements enhance your performance in your content.

hashtagIntel.recommendation: Use this combo for gym selfies and motivational posts; best for morning posts.
Ideal for humorous gym content; post in the evening when engagement peaks.

actionItems.action: Post a carousel of your cutting season meal prep with 'Debussy "Clair de Lune"' audio.
actionItems.expectedBoost: High engagement due to the combination of trending audio and cutting season interest.

actionItems.action: Create a Reel showcasing your first impression of the new YoungLA drop.
actionItems.expectedBoost: Increased views from YoungLA's current buzz in the community.

actionItems.action: Share a transformation post using 'Monkeys Spinning Monkeys' audio for a humorous twist.
actionItems.expectedBoost: High potential for shares due to the humorous audio and relatable content.

actionItems.action: Post a story poll about the DarcSport x Von Dutch collab with Y2K styling tips.
actionItems.expectedBoost: Engagement boost from interactive story format and trending collab.

critical: DM shares (sends per reach) now 3-5x more valuable than likes.
Saves account for 25% of ranking power, with collections being particularly influential.
First 3 seconds retention is crucial for Reels reach — prioritize engaging starts.
Posts with 10+ reposts in 30 days risk being shadowbanned from recommendations.
Carousels are seeing massive save rates, rivaling Reels for engagement — leverage this format.
proTips: Post carousel content at 6-7AM — 40% higher save rates in gym demographic.
Use 'save this' CTAs in slide 3-4 of carousels — drives collection adds.
Reels featuring original sounds see 30% higher engagement — create custom audio.
Engage followers with early morning stories — boosts daily reach by 20%.
Highlight behind-the-scenes content in posts — increases DM shares significantly.

tiktokCrossover.summary: Trending TikTok audios are creating a lag before hitting Instagram, providing an opportunity for early adopters.
